title.rendered: Catch Helijet Nanaimo Parksville Connector Shuttle Service to Parksville, BC Resorts

content.rendered:
Your flight to Nanaimo goes farther with Helijet’s Nanaimo-Parksville Shuttle Connector!

Updated for Summer 2025.
Helijet extends the route of its complimentary shuttle van service, now departing daily throughout the summer, at approximately 11am, following the arrival of Flight 907 (Monday-Friday) and Flight 983 (Weekends) from Vancouver.

Helijet regular drop-off shuttle service continues to depart from the Nanaimo Heliport into downtown Nanaimo after each flight arrival. The enhanced Nanaimo-Parksville Shuttle Connector brings Nanaimo and Parksville closer, with stops at three of beautiful beach side resorts.

Tigh-Na-Mara Seaside Spa Resort & Conference Centre
1155 Resort Drive, Parksville BC V9P 2E3
Look for locals packages and specials online or call 1.800.663.7373
(driving time* between Helijet Nanaimo & Tigh-Na-Mara approximately 35 minutes)

The Beach Club Resort
181 Beachside Drive, Parksville BC V9p 2H5
Visit Beach Club online for specials or call 1.888.760.2008
(driving time* between Helijet Nanaimo & Beach Club Resort approximately 50 minutes)

The Bayside Oceanfront Resort
240 Dogwood Street, Parksville, BC V9P 1E1
Find BC Resident Specials and add-ons online or phone 1.800.663.4232
(driving time* between Helijet Nanaimo & Bayside Oceanfront Resort approximately 65 minutes)

Drop-off at Resorts should be requested when making flight reservations by phone with Helijet Reservations at 1.800.665.4354, and may be possible at locations other than noted, based upon request and on availability. The Parksville Shuttle Connector is only available at the times specified, if you require different times please ask a Helijet agent or your accommodation for assistance with arranging a rental car or other ground services.
Pick-up from one of the three locations must be requested 24 hours in advance by phoning Helijet at 1.800.665.4354, and is limited to locations noted.

 

* 2025 shuttle departure times are approximate, based on street traffic and how many stops are requested per drive.
